script:
F=/home/azureuser/jesus-reyes-responder.py; python3 -c "
import re
src = open('$F').read()
fixed = re.sub(r'^USER_AAD_ID = (\".*\")$', r'USER_AAD_ID = \1\nYOO_AAD_ID = \"e0d48eb4-1eb3-4263-a72e-f6ad4ef32238\"', src, flags=re.MULTILINE)
fixed = re.sub(r'frm\.get\(\"aadObjectId\", \"\"\) != USER_AAD_ID', 'frm.get(\"aadObjectId\", \"\") not in (USER_AAD_ID, YOO_AAD_ID)', fixed)
open('$F','w').write(fixed)
print('done')
"; echo; echo '===== AFTER ====='; grep -E '_AAD_ID|aadObjectId.*not in' $F | head -4; echo; sudo systemctl restart jesus-reyes-responder.service && systemctl is-active jesus-reyes-responder.service
